generated_oml:
instance BrightnessSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Photometric sensor measuring brightness in Living Lab office space, data collected at 1-second intervals via heartbeat mechanism"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BrightnessDataTransmitted
]

instance ColorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Photometric sensor measuring color temperature in Living Lab office space, data collected at 1-second intervals via heartbeat mechanism"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ColorTempDataTransmitted
]

instance BrightnessDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BrightnessSensor
    base:desc "Brightness data transmitted using Eclipse Hono with at-least-once delivery, validated by Eclipse Ditto for value ranges and units"
]

instance ColorTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ColorTemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Color temperature data transmitted using Eclipse Hono with at-least-once delivery, validated by Eclipse Ditto for value ranges and units"
]

instance BrightnessData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Brightness measurement data in lumens"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BrightnessDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoEnabler, HonoEnabler
]

instance ColorTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Color temperature measurement data in Kelvin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ColorTempDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoEnabler, HonoEnabler
]

instance LightActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator managed via LightTwinComponent and DittoController, with control commands validated by Eclipse Ditto's policy-based checks for brightness and color temperature"
]

instance DittoController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto controller for policy-based validation of control commands"
]

instance DittoConnection : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto connection for device addressing in remote control interfaces"
]

instance LightTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "LightTwinComponent instance for lighting system control logic"
]

instance LightFeatureParser : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "LightFeatureParser instance for handling lighting parameters: 'on', brightness, color temperature in Kelvin"
]

instance DSRMethodology : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Design Science Research (DSR) methodology guiding development process with prototyping and experimentation"
]

instance R4ExtensionPoint : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular architecture extension point (R4) for integrating custom analytics services"
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based geometric representation using Revit IFC format enriched with device metadata for sensors and actuators"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMEnabler, MDEEnabler
]

instance LightTwinComponentModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "TwinComponent class for lighting system in digital twin artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance LightFeatureParserModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "FeatureParser controller model for lighting system handling 'on', brightness, color temperature Kelvin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance BIMEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling for static asset representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automating BIM-to-DT artifact generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance BasyxEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Basyx for data integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance itwinJsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bentley Systems' itwin.js for infrastructure digital twin application development"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance TwinLightEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TwinLight research framework for digital twin analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance BOREALISEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS research framework for digital twin applications"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance DittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto enforces value ranges and units for sensor data and validates control commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PhysicalInfrastructureControlService
]

instance HonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for at-least-once message delivery of sensor data and control commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PhysicalInfrastructureControlService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring via interactive visualization for Facility Managers to oversee system states"
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for operational efficiency optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance PhysicalInfrastructureControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Direct control of physical infrastructure through the twin interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustLightBrightnessAction, AdjustColorTemperatureAction
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of system states for Facility Managers"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics insights for operational efficiency"
]

instance AdjustLightBrightnessAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustment of light brightness via Facility Manager interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustColorTemperatureAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustment of color temperature via Facility Manager interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building infrastructure management environment"
    base:contains BrightnessSensor, ColorTemperatureSensor, LightActuator, DittoController, DittoConnection, LightTwinComponent, LightFeatureParser, DSRMethodology, R4ExtensionPoint
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals are transmitted to Building Control Systems (BCS) using Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional communication, enabling Facility Managers and Building Control Engineers to adjust physical infrastructure via the digital twin interface."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized hub architecture with coordinated roles (Building Control Engineer, Facility Manager, DT Engineer) facilitating bidirectional data exchange and modular integration of services for holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises design-time modeling within BIM where Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers to establish semantic foundations; automated deployment via model-driven engineering (MDE) generating deployable artifacts with minimal manual intervention (R2); runtime operation featuring real-time data synchronization using Eclipse Hono and Ditto (R3) for physical-digital alignment; and evolution through modular architecture extension points (R4) supporting custom service integration for operational adaptability."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured through Eclipse Ditto's policy-based validation for sensor data (value ranges, units) and actuator command pre-execution checks. The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, composed of timeliness (0.997), reliability (1.0), and availability (1.0), quantifies synchronization quality. Fault tolerance is provided by Eclipse Hono's at-least-once delivery and Ditto's persistent event storage. Bidirectional synchronization is validated via 1-second heartbeat mechanisms and ODTE measurements over 12-minute windows, confirming zero state divergence and integrity of communication channels."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto are utilized for real-time bidirectional communication between physical assets and digital twins; network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability and redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the provided documents."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points supports scalability from individual components to entire infrastructure systems, with runtime configuration management enabling adjustments without full redeployment; hosting platforms, computational and storage requirements, and deployment models are not detailed in the provided documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems via standardized BIM data schemas and bidirectional communication protocols, with modular architecture supporting standardized extension points for custom services and enterprise system integration."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto ensure compliance with IoT communication standards for real-time data synchronization. BIM serves as the foundational AECO modeling standard, though explicit adherence to specific industry standards (e.g., IFC), certification requirements, or detailed compliance frameworks is not detailed in the documents."
]
